# tfc_publish_registry

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Publish a module to the Terraform Cloud / Enterprise private module registry.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tfc_publish_registry")

tfc_publish_registry(
    name = "publish",
    module = ":my_module",
    organization = "my-org",
    module_name = "my-terraform-module",
    provider = "aws",
    # namespace = "my-namespace",  # optional, defaults to organization
)
```

Authentication requires the `TFE_TOKEN` environment variable.

See [Cloud Integration Overview](README.md) for more information.
